mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MESSAGE ( MESSAGE_NO, SENDER_NO, RECEIVER_NO, CONTENT ) VALUES ( SEQ_MESSAGE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{senderNo}, #{receiverNo}, #{content} )
mapper.select: SELECT M.MESSAGE_NO, M.SENDER_NO, S.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS senderNickname, M.RECEIVER_NO, M.CONTENT, TO_CHAR(M.SEND_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS SEND_DATE, M.READ_FL FROM MESSAGE M JOIN MEMBER S ON M.SENDER_NO = S.MEMBER_NO WHERE M.RECEIVER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY M.SEND_DATE DESC

SELECT M.MESSAGE_NO, M.SENDER_NO, S.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS senderNickname, M.RECEIVER_NO, R.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS receiverNickname, M.CONTENT, TO_CHAR(M.SEND_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS sendDate, M.READ_FL FROM MESSAGE M JOIN MEMBER S ON M.SENDER_NO = S.MEMBER_NO JOIN MEMBER R ON M.RECEIVER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO WHERE M.MESSAGE_NO = #{messageNo} AND (M.SENDER_NO = #{memberNo} OR M.RECEIVER_NO = #{memberNo})

SELECT M.MESSAGE_NO, M.SENDER_NO, S.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS senderNickname, M.RECEIVER_NO, R.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS receiverNickname, M.CONTENT, TO_CHAR(M.SEND_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS SEND_DATE, M.READ_FL FROM MESSAGE M JOIN MEMBER S ON M.SENDER_NO = S.MEMBER_NO JOIN MEMBER R ON M.RECEIVER_NO = R.MEMBER_NO WHERE M.SENDER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY M.SEND_DATE DESC
